prompt: which system names and active statuses are associated with every IT support specialist?
expected: {"is_ambiguous": true, "interpretations": ["SELECT Systems.system_name, Systems.is_active  from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id   GROUP BY It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  It_Support_Specialists)", "select it_support_specialists.name , systems.system_name , systems.is_active from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id"]}
